office_does: The county clerk maintains Superior Court records, receives filings, and administers court-related financial and public-service functions.
race_blurb: Incumbent Charles Rhodes faces Tammy Clark, whose background includes more than 20 years in the legal field.

candidates.summary: Incumbent Mason County clerk with direct administration of the office.
highlights: Listed by Washington Courts as the serving county clerk [S2]
Runs the office but has no detailed reelection platform in the dossier [S2][S3]

experience.basis: Current service as county clerk supports a record-based profile, but the dossier does not establish tenure or accomplishments warranting the maximum.

candidates.summary: Legal-field professional with local treasurer and dispute-resolution experience.
highlights: Has a business-administration degree and more than 20 years in the legal field [S2]
Emphasizes accurate records, prompt service, and accessible administration [S2]

experience.basis: More than 20 years in the legal field and local treasurer experience support a record-oriented, though non-incumbent, profile.
